name: Sylvera Carbon Credit Quality Data and Ratings REST API
what_it_does: Sylvera carbon credit quality data and ratings REST API for corporates, financial institutions, and carbon market participants to assess carbon credit quality, monitor voluntary carbon market projects, access project ratings, and analyze carbon portfolio performance — enabling automated carbon credit due diligence, VCM intelligence, and climate investment quality assurance through Sylvera's AI-powered carbon ratings platform covering 1,000+ carbon projects worldwide. Enables AI agents to manage project rating for carbon credit quality assessment automation, handle project search for voluntary carbon market project discovery automation, access credit analysis for specific carbon credit vintage assessment automation, retrieve portfolio for carbon credit holding quality analysis automation, manage market intelligence for VCM pricing and trend automation, handle registry data for Verra, Gold Standard, and ACR credit information automation, access additionality assessment for carbon credit legitimacy automation, retrieve permanence rating for carbon storage durability assessment automation, manage leakage analysis for project boundary integrity automation, and integrate Sylvera with corporate carbon offsetting, climate finance, and ESG reporting platforms for quality carbon market automation.
use_cases: Assessing carbon credit quality ratings before purchasing voluntary carbon credits for corporate net-zero automation agents
Monitoring carbon portfolio quality and permanence risk for climate finance investment automation agents
Accessing Verra and Gold Standard registry project data for carbon credit sourcing automation agents
Analyzing carbon market pricing trends for corporate carbon procurement strategy automation agents
not_for: Compliance carbon markets (Sylvera focuses on voluntary carbon markets, not EU ETS or California cap-and-trade)
Carbon accounting and footprint calculation (Sylvera is carbon credit ratings, not emissions accounting)
Real-time carbon trading execution (Sylvera is market intelligence, not a carbon credit exchange)
best_when: A corporate, financial institution, or carbon market participant wanting AI agents to assess voluntary carbon credit quality, monitor project performance, access VCM intelligence, and analyze carbon portfolio quality through Sylvera's AI-powered carbon ratings platform.
avoid_when: VCM DATA IS NOT REAL-TIME TRADING: Sylvera provides quality ratings and market intelligence, not live exchange prices; automated real-time bid/ask assumption creates static_data; automated must use carbon credit exchanges (Xpansiv, ACX) for live trading prices. RATINGS ARE SYLVERA'S OPINION: Sylvera ratings are analytical assessments, not official registry certifications; automated official-certification assumption creates methodology_disclaimer; automated must disclose that Sylvera ratings are analytical and not registry certification. COVERAGE IS PROJECT-LEVEL NOT CREDIT-LEVEL: Sylvera rates projects, not every individual credit vintage; automated per-credit rating assumption creates project-level rating only; automated must understand project-level coverage and vintage-level analysis limitations. ENTERPRISE ACCESS REQUIRED: Sylvera data requires enterprise subscription; automated open API assumption creates subscription_required; automated must establish Sylvera enterprise subscription for API access.

auth.notes: Sylvera uses API key + OAuth2 for carbon data REST API. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2020 by Allister Furey and Alberto Toril. Products: Carbon Project Ratings, Credit Analysis, Portfolio Analytics, Market Intelligence, Registry Data. SDKs: None public. 1,000+ projects covered. AI-powered satellite and ground-truth data analysis. Backed by Index Ventures, Balderton Capital, Insight Partners. Competes with Pachama for voluntary carbon market data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Limited access for evaluation; production requires enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by project coverage; enterprise custom pricing; API + data products
pricing.notes: London UK. Index/Balderton backed. Annual subscription. 1,000+ carbon projects. VCM intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; project and portfolio analytics throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: SYLVERA RATINGS ARE A-F SCALE: Sylvera uses A-F letter rating scale for carbon projects; automated numeric score assumption creates rating_format_mismatch; automated must handle Sylvera's A-F rating system with rating-specific decision thresholds

PROJECT IDs VARY BY REGISTRY: Carbon projects use different IDs across Verra (VCS), Gold Standard (GS), and other registries; automated universal project ID assumption creates registry-specific lookup requirements; automated must handle registry-specific project identifiers

SATELLITE DATA POWERS RATINGS: Sylvera uses satellite imagery for forest carbon project monitoring; automated ground-truth-only assumption misunderstands Sylvera's remote sensing methodology; automated must understand that Sylvera's analysis reflects satellite-based monitoring

VINTAGE YEAR MATTERS: Carbon credits have vintage years affecting quality and pricing; automated same-rating-all-vintages assumption creates vintage_quality_variance; automated must specify vintage year for accurate credit quality assessment

MARKET INTELLIGENCE DATA HAS LAG: VCM market data may have publication lag; automated real-time market assumption creates stale pricing data; automated must specify data freshness requirements and use carbon exchanges for live pricing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Carbon market data. GDPR. API key + OAuth2. UK/EU. Carbon project ratings and market intelligence data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Carbon market. GDPR. API key + OAuth2. UK/EU. Carbon project and market data.
